message:
feat(ui,search): click-to-position cursor in search bar, progressive search refinement, pane-aware hover tracking

Search bar cursor positioning:
- Add set_query_cursor_from_search_bar_click() that computes the correct
  byte-level cursor position from a mouse click's x coordinate by walking
  the query string's unicode display widths, accounting for the search
  prefix icon width and multi-byte characters
- Wire search bar clicks to position the cursor at the click point instead
  of always jumping to the end of the query

Progressive search refinement:
- Replace the deferred upgrade-scheduling pattern (should_refine_search +
  SEARCH_UPGRADE_DELAY timer) with direct progressive search state
  tracking via search_refining flag and live_search_request
- Fix variable shadowing: clone sender/stop into phase_sender/phase_stop
  before moving into the async progressive search callback to avoid
  capturing already-moved values
- Remove unused SEARCH_UPGRADE_DELAY constant and should_refine_search()

Pane-aware hover tracking:
- Update HoveredResult from bare Option<usize> to a struct with pane_idx
  and item_idx for correct multi-pane hover identification
- Add hit_test_returns_pane_header_for_pane_title_area test
- Add mouse_move_over_non_active_pane_tracks_pane_aware_hover test

Formatting:
- Reformat import ordering and line wrapping in query.rs (no logic changes)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
